name: Review-Conquest Compilation
description: Faceless VO montage of REAL, verified competitor reviews targeting the '<competitor> reviews' keyword, that names the recurring complaints, positions the user's own business as the alternative, then appends the user's own customer testimonial reel and ends on the user's CTA.
best_for: ranking for a competitor's '<competitor> reviews' / '<competitor> alternative' keyword
honest comparative / conquest marketing from real sourced reviews
turning a competitor's own critical reviews into your top-of-funnel proof
not_for: competitors with little or no genuine critical-review volume (would require fabrication)
attacking a person rather than comparing products
any claim the user's product cannot truthfully back

stages.title: Confirm real reviews exist
actions: WebSearch to confirm the competitor is real and where its reviews live
Stop if there is no genuine critical-review volume

stages.title: Sweep every review surface, then adversarially verify
actions: Fan out finders: Trustpilot, G2/Capterra, app stores, Reddit/forums, review blogs, YouTube, X/LinkedIn
Extract verbatim quotes with author, date, rating, sentiment, theme, and exact source URL
Drive a real Chrome session for sites that 403 automated fetches (Trustpilot) via star-filtered views
Adversarially verify every critical quote; default to reject if not corroborated verbatim

stages.title: Themes, mapping, and script
actions: Map each theme to a TRUE strength of the user's business
Write an honest sentiment breakdown and a fast VO script ending on the testimonial handoff
Show the user the verified reviews + script before any paid generation

stages.title: Screenshots, VO, captions, clips
actions: Screenshot the REAL review pages (never generate a fake review screenshot); brand lightly with VERIFIED tag + on-screen source
Generate ElevenLabs VO and beat-locked karaoke captions
Ken Burns on screenshots / gentle zoom on cards; cut every 3-6s on screenshots, 2-4s on cards

stages.title: Three-part concat with the user's reel appended
actions: Part A = teardown clips + captions + VO (fade in, no fade out)
Part B = the user's testimonial reel appended with its own audio, loudnorm-matched, lightly branded
Part C = the user's silent end-card/CTA, fade to black
Normalize all parts to h264/yuv420p/1920x1080/30fps + aac/48k/stereo and concat

stages.title: QC and keyword packaging
actions: Verify audio in every segment, seams, ~-16 LUFS, no black frames (ffmpeg_qc)
Keyword-led title, description that restates the keyword and states reviews are real + sourced, chapters, tags, hook thumbnail

qc_checks: only real verified attributable reviews on screen
honest about the competitor's overall rating
real screenshots, never generated review UI
audio present across teardown + appended reel + end card
